title: usys.ini
text: usys.ini The usys.ini file is the default initialization file for Uniface applications. Default location: Depends on the value specified by the /adm switch. In Uniface installation, a usys.ini file is located in /uniface/adm and /common/adm Unix On Unix, the usys.ini file contains only the [install] and [webwidgets] sections. File Sections [accelerators] [application] [background] and [foreground] [colorbox] [ENTITIES] [chui] [graphic filters] [help] [history] [install] [layout] [ocx] [PATHS] [printer] [procbox] [state] [toolbar] [udde] [uniface_dlls] [upi] [user] [webwidgets] [webentitywidgets] [webcomponentwidgets] [WIDGETS] Related Links /ini Specify the initialization file or GUI resource file used by the application. Configuration Settings: Initialization Initialization settings are used to configure the application on a specific platform. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
